name: Suspicious VBScript Execution
description: Detects wscript or cscript executing VBScript files from suspicious locations
query:
// Detect VBScript execution from temp, downloads, or user profile paths
// Trigger on script hosts running .vbs from unusual locations
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)(wscript|cscript)\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(\\temp\\|\\tmp\\|\\downloads\\|\\appdata\\|\\users\\.*\\desktop\\).*\.vbs"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
